cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 55% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.40% · BTC +3.07% · Gold +1.43% · Nasdaq100 +0.25%. 55% of 89 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical is doing the heavy lifting at +0.94%.

cards.headline: Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical leads, Chip Equipment & AI Hardware lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical at +0.94%; weakest is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at -0.84%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: AVAV is the standout at +9.04%
cards.body: Leaders: AVAV +9.04%, PLTR +4.48%, SMCI +4.09%, ADBE +3.03%, ADBE +3.03%. Laggards: DELL -4.27%, BIDU -3.29%, KLAC -2.94%, META -2.04%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +0.66% at $158.58
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +0.66% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
